title: DATALAND
author: @annacondo
description: DATALAND is the world’s first Museum of AI Arts, designed by Refik Anadol Studio to explore how artificial intelligence and human creativity intersect.

title: Refik Anadol's AI Art Museum
author: Refik Anadol
description: Refik Anadol's AI Art Museum is opening in Los Angeles, featuring AI-powered art installations.

title: LA on the Move
author: Jen
description: LA on the Move is an immersive experience that explores the intersection of wildlife and humans in Los Angeles.

title: LA Metro Interactive Map
author: Unknown
description: LA Metro Interactive Map is a navigation app that simplifies travel on the LA Metro transit system.

title: Data Con LA
author: Unknown
description: Data Con LA is a conference that explores the intersection of data and technology in Los Angeles.

title: BuildLA Appointment System
author: City of Los Angeles
description: BuildLA Appointment System is a platform that simplifies the process of scheduling appointments with the City of Los Angeles.

title: Discover LA
author: Unknown
description: Discover LA is an app that provides a guide to Los Angeles, featuring contextually crafted information and designs.

title: County of Los Angeles Open Data
author: County of Los Angeles
description: County of Los Angeles Open Data is a platform that provides access to open datasets and visualizations for the county.

title: LIVE FROM LA
author: Processing Foundation
description: LIVE FROM LA is a project that explores the intersection of creativity and technology in Los Angeles.

title: Art + Tech Lab
author: LACMA
description: Art + Tech Lab is a program that supports experiments in design, creative entrepreneurship, and interdisciplinary dialogue.
